appraisal_events.evidence: « Le duc le regarda, le reconnut, se vit perdu, cependant que le domestique … hurlait … “Son Altesse Monseigneur le duc de Châtellerault !” »
appraisal_events.explanation: The public, emphatic announcement exposes Châtellerault and makes him ‘se voir perdu,’ signaling a localized loss of face despite the honorific form.

status_effects.explanation: He is locally embarrassed/exposed (“se vit perdu”) by the huissier’s loud proclamation.
